blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 672 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
